headline: /review-plan: wrap-up is now a user action, not an implementing-agent step

bullets: /review-plan flips the always-required final step from "Run /wrap-up" to "Hand off to user." Wrap-up, merge, tag, and push are user actions; the implementing agent stops at code-reviewer.

New Auto-Wrap-Up anti-pattern (High severity) catches plans that instruct the agent to run /wrap-up, make tag, git merge, git push, or describe wrap-up actions inline. The previous Inlined Wrap-Up (Medium) is folded in — same blast radius.
